author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 6: 2 Tier-3 docs (VFS sweep cont'd).

fs/vfs/mount.md (305 lines, 16 REQ / 16 AC, 0 open) — vfsmount + struct mount + mount namespace tree + propagation rules (shared/private/slave/unbindable) + idmapped mounts + fs_pin + fs_struct + pivot_root + chroot. /proc/<pid>/mountinfo format-identity. MS_*/MOUNT_ATTR_* numeric byte-identity. TLA+ model models/fs/mount_propagation.tla owned here. Mandatory L3 mount-tree-acyclic invariant.

fs/vfs/path-resolution.md (273 lines, 15 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open) — namei.c + LOOKUP_* + RCU-walk fast path + ref-walk fallback + symlink resolution + mount-traversal + d_path family. openat2 RESOLVE_* numeric byte-identity. RCU-walk seqcount safety co-owned with dcache. Walk-state invariants checked.

VFS core sweep complete: 00-overview + dcache + inode + super + file-table + mount + path-resolution = 6 sub-tier-3 docs (plus the existing dcache from earlier batches). Only fs-context.md remains for the modern mount API.

Total .design/ docs: 51.
